title: Stech Email Tone Improver
description: Paste your original email, and Stech will rewrite it with a warmer, more honest, and human tone.

originalEmail.title: Original Email
originalEmail.description: The email content you want to improve.
originalEmail.prefill: Dear Sir, we regret to inform you that your application has been rejected. Thank you for your understanding.

targetTone.title: Target Tone (optional)
targetTone.description: e.g., friendly, professional-warm, empathetic, encouraging. Default: warm and honest.

additionalInstructions.title: Additional Instructions (optional)
additionalInstructions.description: Anything else you want Stech to consider?
